base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of piranha_plant_bite — a character from 1985 super mario bros. piranha emerges from pipe and alternates open-bite / closed-mouth while on-screen. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame mouth open/close — piranha emerges from pipe and alternates open-bite / closed-mouth while on-screen
